PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov for and with Margaret Vintero (Administrator).

The Court asked Counsel if they want an Executor and two Administrators. Mr. Dobrov replied "no", stated that it was a family issue, that they would like to follow the will, have his Client appointed and move forward. Mr. Dobrov also stated that Kathy Fujimoto does not want to serve and that Keiko Hattori would still like to serve but she is not here today. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
